nasb.text: and when all the people had finished crossing, the ark of the Lord and the priests crossed before the people.

esv.text: And when all the people had finished passing over, the ark of the Lord and the priests passed over before the people.

cnv.text: 全體人民都過了河以後，耶和華的約櫃和祭司才在人民的面前過去。

ccb.text: 所有人都过河以后，祭司才抬着耶和华的约柜在民众注视之下过了河。
